# INPersonSuggestionType.socialProfile

**Case**

A social media account.

## Declaration

```swift
case socialProfile
```

## Discussion

When specified, interaction objects become populated with the person’s social media account name instead of their actual name.

## Constants

- **INPersonSuggestionType.none**: No contact information to donate.
- **INPersonSuggestionType.instantMessageAddress**: An instant messaging address.
title: INPersonSuggestionType.socialProfile
